form.formComment: On a four run winning streak. Freshened for 40 days. Last to post a big 15 len win. Catterick on March 4 over 5000m defeating Lunar Contact carrying 72kg at $5 in a steeplechase. Start before won by 4 len Borders P2p on February 8 over 4800m defeating Courting Flow with 76kg in a jumps. Must go on top on that back of that form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free and made several jump errors.

form.formComment: Resuming after two years. Finished off last preparation winning by 2.25 len this track May 11 2024 over 4840m defeating Toucan Sam carrying 76kg at $11. When resuming last campaign 4 of 12 starters at Overton April 27 2024 over 4000m, 7 len behind Modder River carrying 76kg. Should pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Comes off a 46 day let-up. Last run pulled up at Wetherby on February 26 over 4840m. Before that pulled up at Ayr on February 10 over 4800m. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Comes off a 46 day let-up. Last run pulled up at Wetherby on February 26 over 4840m. Before that pulled up at Ayr on February 10 over 4800m. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 40 day letup. Last start finished second of 7 starters at Catterick on March 4 over 5000m, 15 len behind Brandy Mcqueen carrying 74kg at $7. Before that finished sixth of 9 runners at Borders P2p on February 8 over 4800m, 28 len behind Whatdeawant carrying 73.5kg. Has the ability to be in the finish. Certainly worth including.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation pulled up at Sandown Park on January 31 over 4800m. First up last campaign pulled up at Cheltenham on October 25 over 5000m. Expect a forward showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-31.5). Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation pulled up at Sandown Park on January 31 over 4800m. First up last campaign pulled up at Cheltenham on October 25 over 5000m. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming finished second of 7 starters at Northumberland P2p on February 21 over 4000m, 10 len behind Largy Shark with 79.5kg. Second run from a spell finished third in a small field at Dingley on April 4 over 4800m, 5.5 len behind Call Me Early carrying 76kg. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Freshened for 36 days. Last run favourite; won by 1.0 len Borders P2p on March 8 over 4800m defeating Harjo carrying 80.5kg in a jumps. The start before that; ran last in a small field at Northumberland P2p on February 21 over 4800m, 6 len behind Eastern Storm carrying 75.5kg. Major player again.

form.formComment: Freshened for 36 days. Last run finished second in a small field at Carlisle on March 8 over 4200m, 5.5 len behind Bellaney Lord with 69kg at $15. Race before finished fifth in a small field at Haydock Park on February 14 over 4400m, 45 len behind Unexpected Party with 71kg at $67. Will be tested. Looks to have the job ahead.
